accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details grounded in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as establishing policy on appraisal services for Interior Department transactions.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the Act supersedes prior federal or state laws requiring state-specific licensure for covered transactions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the three conditions for using out-of-state appraisers and the scope of the authorization.

effective_dates.why: Notes 90-day deadline for public availability and annual reporting for the following four years.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including licensing, preference for local, conditions, reporting, and public availability.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the Secretary of the Interior and Department of the Interior.

correct_figures.why: 90-day deadline and reporting timeline correctly stated.
